hero.title: Strong Infrastructure in Metal Packaging Production
hero.description: We produce metal packaging with high quality standards in Turkey and global markets.

history.title: Our History
history.subtitle: Our Journey
history.description: Since 1986, as a leading company in the metal packaging industry, we continue to grow by combining quality and innovation.

cta.title: Towards the Future
cta.description: With over 40 years of experience, we continue to provide innovative solutions in the metal packaging industry and deliver the highest quality service to our customers.

events.1986: Our company was established in 1986 under the name BANTAS for Turkey and Middle Eastern countries and started producing its first products.
events.1994: Bantas was established in 1994 under the name BANTAS and started production for Turkey and Middle Eastern countries. Our company offers quality and modern technology products.
events.1998_1: Our developed products received great interest in Turkey and Middle Eastern countries and exports to these countries began. At the same time, it gained an important position in the domestic market.
events.1998_2: Our developed products received great interest in Turkey and Middle Eastern countries and exports to these countries began.
events.2005: As Bantas, we have reached the production capacity of 750 thousand 500cc Metal Boxes, Preparation Cans, Paint Cans, 10 Liter and 20 Liter CANS, 5 KG AND 10 KG Adhesive Cans and other metal packaging products.
events.2008: We have 727 different product types for our customers and serve with 25-50 product types that can appeal to all sectors.
events.2009: Thanks to offset printing technology, 6-color printing can be done on 500 ml 1 lt 2 lt 5 lt 10 lt 20 lt packages.
events.2010: Moving to a new factory building and increasing production capacity.
events.2011: 18 liter 20 lt packaging production line was established and 500cc metal packaging production started.
events.2016: Quality certificates were obtained. Sales network expanded in Turkey and Middle Eastern countries. 10 and 18 liter can production capacity reached 1 million units.
events.2017: A new factory was established for our growing structure. Our production capacity was increased with new products and technologies. An environmentally friendly and sustainable production approach was adopted. A strong position was achieved in domestic and international markets.

technology.title: Technology
technology.subtitle: Our Production Technologies
technology.description: In our modern production facilities, we carry out metal packaging production according to international quality standards with state-of-the-art machines and our experienced team.

metalOffsetBaski.title: BANTAS METAL OFFSET PRINTING FACTORY
metalOffsetBaski.description: Our company, established in 2004 under the Bantas A.S brand with the aim of providing you with innovative, advanced, quality products and services and increasing customer satisfaction, is one of Turkey's first metal offset printing and tin can production facilities and continues to make large investments for new approaches.

metal-offset-baski.subtitle: METAL OFFSET PRINTING
metal-offset-baski.details: Our Offset Printing factory provides the most advanced offset printing and highest quality metal offset printing, production technology with cans and metal offset printing service. Our company produces according to European and American standards with its Metal Offset Printing factory, and the products produced in Metal Offset Printing and Tin Can Production Facilities perform Key Offset printing and stage processing in 1500*1100 maximum 1500*700 maximum colors. Our products produced with advanced technology provide metal offset printing service with offset tin printing and offset films according to your needs and demands.

tenekeKutu.title: BANTAS TIN CAN FACTORY
tenekeKutu.description: In our company, plastic, metal, tin, oil and Senner damaged tin can production is carried out. Our products are produced in fully automatic machines in accordance with international standards. Our company continuously invests in new technologies, works on new processes and produces without compromising quality in order to produce high quality tin cans.

teneke-kutu.subtitle: PRODUCTION PROCESS
teneke-kutu.details: All these stages have been assigned 5 Stage Production System 'All This 2000*2000 Circle Defense system and 18 18001 2014 Occupational Health and Safety management system certificate. Separate productions are also produced in our subsidiary. The dimensions of our tin packaging vary between SS All and 300 mm according to customer and demand. Our company has reached the production capacity of 750 thousand 500cc Metal Boxes, Preparation Cans, Paint Cans, 10 Liter and 20 Liter CANS, 5 KG AND 10 KG Adhesive Cans and other metal packaging products.

tenekeEbatlari.title: TIN CAN SIZES
tenekeEbatlari.description: Our company has reached the production capacity of 750 thousand 500cc Metal Boxes, Preparation Cans, Paint Cans, 10 Liter and 20 Liter CANS, 5 KG AND 10 KG Adhesive Cans and other metal packaging products. We can produce in custom sizes according to our customers' needs.

certificates.title: Our Quality Certificates
certificates.subtitle: Quality and Standards
certificates.description: Our company, which produces in accordance with international quality standards, provides confidence to our customers with its certificates.

intro.title: Our Quality Assurance
intro.text: Our company has international standards in quality management systems, environmental management, occupational health and safety, and food safety. All our production processes are carried out in accordance with these standards.

iso9001.title: ISO 9001:2015 Quality Management System
iso9001.description: ISO 9001:2015 Quality Management System certificate shows that our company's quality management system complies with international standards. This certificate ensures that we increase customer satisfaction and adhere to continuous improvement principles.

iso14001.title: ISO 14001:2015 Environmental Management System
iso14001.description: ISO 14001:2015 Environmental Management System certificate demonstrates our company's commitment to environmentally friendly production. Preventing environmental pollution, using natural resources efficiently, and sustainable production are among our basic principles.

iso45001.title: ISO 45001:2018 Occupational Health and Safety Management System
iso45001.description: ISO 45001:2018 Occupational Health and Safety Management System certificate shows that we take all necessary measures to protect the health and safety of our employees. Providing a safe working environment is our priority.

iso22000.title: ISO 22000:2018 Food Safety Management System
iso22000.description: ISO 22000:2018 Food Safety Management System certificate shows that our packaging production in contact with food complies with international food safety standards. Providing safe products to our customers is our most important responsibility.

halal.title: Halal Food Certificate
halal.description: Halal Food Certificate shows that our production processes and products comply with Islamic rules. With this certificate, we serve our Muslim customers with confidence.

footer.title: Our Quality Commitment
footer.description: As Bantaş, we continue to continuously improve our quality standards and provide the highest quality products and services to our customers. All our certificates are regularly audited and renewed.

recruitment.title: BANTAS Selection And Placement Process
recruitment.paragraph1: At Bantas, to select the most suitable resource for the applied position, measurable competency comparison is made.
recruitment.paragraph2: At Bantas, to select the most suitable resource for the applied position, measurable competency comparison is made. For this position, competency comparison is made.

imageSection.title: We Wrote Our Name At The Summit With Our Employees
imageSection.description: With all of our employees and the strong team we have achieved important competencies, we continue to ensure employee satisfaction, which is the biggest factor of our successes in our production.

socialResponsibility.title: Social Responsibility
socialResponsibility.subtitle: Our Social Responsibility
socialResponsibility.description: We are aware of our responsibility towards society and the environment. Learn about our social responsibility projects and environmental awareness.

intro.title: WE ARE AWARE OF OUR SOCIAL RESPONSIBILITY.
intro.paragraph1: As Bantas A.S., carrying social responsibility awareness, in the direction of social development of our country.
intro.paragraph2: Just as, our employees, our families, contributing to society.

footer.title: Our Social Responsibility Commitment
footer.description: As Bantas, being aware of our responsibility towards society and the environment, we continue to develop sustainable projects and leave a more livable world for future generations.

cheese.title: Cheese Cans
cheese.subtitle: Food Packaging Solutions
cheese.description: Preserve the freshness of your products with our specially designed, hygienic and durable metal packaging solutions for cheese and dairy products.

intro.title: Our Cheese Storage Solutions
intro.paragraph1: Our cheese cans are specially designed to preserve the freshness and flavor of cheese for a long time.
intro.paragraph2: Manufactured from stainless and hygienic materials in accordance with food safety standards.
intro.paragraph3: We respond to all kinds of needs by producing in different sizes and capacities.

feature1.title: Hygienic Production
feature1.description: Produced in hygienic conditions in accordance with food safety standards.

feature2.title: Airtight Lid
feature2.description: Preserves product freshness for a long time with special lid system.

feature3.title: Custom Design
feature3.description: Custom printing and design options are available for your brand.

cta.title: Cheese Can Order
cta.description: Contact us for detailed information about our quality cheese cans and to place an order.

oil.title: Oil Cans
oil.subtitle: Oil Storage Solutions
oil.description: Our specially designed, leak-proof and durable metal packaging solutions for olive oil, sunflower oil and other liquid oils.

intro.title: Our Oil Storage Solutions
intro.paragraph1: Our oil cans are designed for safe and hygienic storage of liquid oils.
intro.paragraph2: Provides long-lasting use with leak-proof lid system and durable structure.
intro.paragraph3: Suitable for olive oil, sunflower oil and all other liquid oils.

feature1.title: Leak-proof Structure
feature1.description: Provides completely leak-proof protection with special gasket system.

feature2.title: Easy to Use
feature2.description: Easy to open and close with practical lid system.

cta.title: Oil Can Order
cta.description: Contact us for detailed information about our high quality oil cans and to place an order.

olive.title: Olive / Pickle Cans
olive.subtitle: Brine Product Packaging
olive.description: Our specially designed, acid-resistant and hygienic metal packaging solutions for olives, pickles and brine products.

intro.title: Our Brine Product Solutions
intro.paragraph1: Our olive and pickle cans are specially designed for safe storage of brine products.
intro.paragraph2: Preserves the taste and quality of the product with acid-resistant inner coating.
intro.paragraph3: We offer solutions suitable for all kinds of needs with production in different sizes.

feature1.title: Acid Resistance
feature1.description: Full protection against brine with special inner coating.

feature2.title: Hygienic Production
feature2.description: Production in accordance with food safety standards.

cta.title: Olive/Pickle Can Order
cta.description: Contact us for detailed information about our special cans for brine products and to place an order.

chemical.title: Thinner / Antifreeze / Mineral Oil Cans
chemical.subtitle: Chemical Product Packaging
chemical.description: Our specially designed, safe and durable metal packaging solutions for thinner, antifreeze, mineral oil and other chemical products.

intro.title: Our Chemical Product Solutions
intro.paragraph1: Our chemical product cans are specially designed for safe storage of hazardous materials.
intro.paragraph2: Provides maximum safety with chemical resistant inner coating and leak-proof lid system.
intro.paragraph3: Suitable for use in international transportation with production in accordance with UN standards.

feature1.title: Chemical Resistance
feature1.description: Full protection against chemical substances with special coating.

feature2.title: Safety
feature2.description: Maximum safety with leak-proof lid and safety gasket.

feature3.title: Standards Compliance
feature3.description: Production in accordance with UN and ADR standards.

cta.title: Chemical Product Can Order
cta.description: Contact us for detailed information about our safe cans for chemical products and to place an order.

genelKurul.title: General Assembly Information
genelKurul.subtitle: Compliance Reports
genelKurul.description: Our company's general assembly meetings and resolutions
genelKurul.infoDescription: Our General Assembly meetings are held in accordance with the Turkish Commercial Code and Capital Markets Legislation. Meeting agenda items, participation information and resolutions are publicly disclosed through the Public Disclosure Platform (KAP).
genelKurul.ctaDescription: For detailed information about general assembly meetings and other corporate information, you can review our investor relations pages.

faaliyetRaporlari.title: Activity Reports
faaliyetRaporlari.subtitle: Activity Reports
faaliyetRaporlari.description: Our company's annual and periodic activity reports
faaliyetRaporlari.infoDescription: Our activity reports contain detailed information about our company's financial status, operational performance and strategic objectives. Reports are prepared in accordance with Capital Markets Board regulations and publicly disclosed.

hero.tagline: Your trusted partner in metal packaging.

quickActions.quoteDesc: Reach us for packaging solutions tailored to your needs.
quickActions.kvkk: Your personal data is protected under KVKK (Turkish Data Protection Law). You can review our privacy notice.
quickActions.catalogDesc: Browse our product groups in PDF format.

features.experienceDesc: Deep know-how in metal packaging and growing capacity.
features.qualityDesc: Production aligned with international standards and rigorous QC.

qualitySection.title: Bantaş quality elevates your brand
qualitySection.body: Alongside producing high-quality and reliable tin packaging, Bantaş uses advanced printing technology to enhance the visual quality of your products and influence your customers' purchasing decisions.

intro.title: Bantaş tin packaging
intro.body: We manufacture at scale in our modern Bandırma facilities and supply reliable tin packaging for food and industrial applications.

about.title: Bantaş
about.p1: Bantaş is a metal packaging company focused on innovative and sustainable production.
about.p2: We prioritize environmentally conscious production and workplace safety while developing tailored customer solutions.
about.p3: As a strong supplier in Türkiye and abroad, we add value through quality and on-time delivery.
